subject: Run packet-first /graph validation review
body: Use packet-first review workflow immediately for /graph reviews. Required files: docs/AGENT_WEB_REVIEW_BRIEF.md, data/graph-analysis-packets.json, data/website-section-index.json, data/graph-packet-schema.json, docs/GRAPH_PACKET_AGENT_DEPLOYMENT.md, docs/agent-handoffs/CURRENT_STATE_SUMMARY.md. Run one validation review using the deployment guide. Output using packet-grounded review only. Do not open raw graph JSON unless escalation is justified.
